title: Portal Hypertension
overview: Key changes in portal hypertension guidance, focusing on non-invasive risk stratification, endoscopy avoidance criteria, and NSBB use.

updates.title: Non-invasive criteria for avoiding screening endoscopy refined
updates.summary: Baveno VII places greater emphasis on LSM and platelet-based risk stratification in selected compensated patients.
updates.oldRecommendation: Earlier guidance used Baveno VI criteria to identify low-risk patients who may avoid screening endoscopy.
updates.newRecommendation: Current guidance further integrates non-invasive assessment to identify patients at low risk for high-risk varices.
updates.whatChanged: The role of non-invasive stratification became more central and clinically actionable.
updates.clinicalImpact: May reduce unnecessary screening endoscopies in carefully selected compensated advanced chronic liver disease patients.
